name: forgeflow
description: Artifact-first delivery workflow for Codex: clarify, plan, execute, review, ship through markdown artifacts

interface.shortDescription: Artifact-first delivery workflow for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use ForgeFlow in Codex App or Codex CLI to guide coding agents through an artifact-backed pipeline: clarify requirements into a design brief, plan execution steps, implement with evidence tracking, review independently, then ship. All artifacts are markdown files. No runtime dependencies.
